trip.form.sectionBasicsHelp: Define the trip name, dates and overall status.
trip.form.sectionDestinationHelp: Search for the trip base location to connect maps, distances and plans.
trip.form.sectionAccommodationHelp: Add accommodation when you have it to calculate distances and show it on maps.
trip.form.statusHelp: Use the status to separate drafts, active trips, visited trips or archived trips.
